posts.title: What are Magic Methods?
posts.text: Magic MethodWhat are magic methods? They’re everything in object-oriented Python. They’re special methods that you can define to add “magic” to your classes. They’re always surrounded by double underscores (e.g. init or lt). Rafe KettlerA Guide to Python's Magic Methods 어떤 클래스의 인스턴스에 어떤 동작을 취하려고 할 때, Call 되는 미리 만들어진 메소드들. Class Initialization과 Compasion Operator에 관련된 Magic Method들로 실습해보자. 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526class Word(str): # str을 상속받음 '''Class for words, defining comparison based on word length.''' # Note that we have to use __new__. This is because str is an immutable # type, so we have to initialize it early (at creation) # When subclassing immutable built-in types like numbers and strings, # and occasionally in other situations, # the static method __new__ comes in handy. # __init__으로 하면 아예 작동하지 않는다. 관련 내용은 아래 링크에서 확인. # https://www.python.org/download/releases/2.2.3/descrintro/#__new__ def __new__(cls, word): if ' ' in word: print ("Value contains spaces. Truncating to first space.") word = word[:word.index(' ')] # Word is now all chars before first space return str.__new__(cls, word) def __gt__(self, other): return len(self) > len(other) def __lt__(self, other): return len(self) < len(other) def __ge__(self, other): return len(self) >= len(other) def __le__(self, other): return len(self) <= len(other) 12345678910blah = Word('blahblah bb')print(blah)damn = Word('damn')print(damn < blah) # blah가 8자로 더 길기 때문에, True가 반환된다.# --Console Output--Value contains spaces. Truncating to first space.blahblahTrue 123456print('damn' < 'blahblah') # 일반 문자열에서는, 알파벳 순으로 비교하며, 더 뒤에 있는 알파벳이# 더 큰 것으로 취급된다. 그래서 False가 출력된다.# --Console Output--false Word 클래스 안에서, Operator가 Call하는 Magic Method들을 재정의하여 Override 했다.그래서 값이 같은 문자열임에도 불구하고, Word 클래스의 인스턴스인 문자열과값으로서의 문자열에서의 Operator의 행동이 다르다. 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546class isThereError(): something = 0 def __setattr__(self, name, value): self.name = value # since every time an attribute is assigned, __setattr__() is called, this # is recursion. # so this really means self.__setattr__('name', value). Since the method # keeps calling itself, the recursion goes on forever causing a crashpresume = isThereError()presume.somethingnono = 1# __setattr__ 안에 인스턴스의 변수를 변경시키는 기능이 들어 있어서, 또 자기 자신을 호출하게 된다.# 그래서 아래처럼 RecursionError: maximum recursion depth exceeded 를 발생시킨다.# --Console Output-- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- RecursionError Traceback (most recent call last) <ipython-input-50-5ff951d7c6d3> in <module> 9 10 presume = isThereError() ---> 11 presume.somethingnono = 1 <ipython-input-50-5ff951d7c6d3> in __setattr__(self, name, value) 2 something = 0 3 def __setattr__(self, name, value): ----> 4 self.name = value 5 # since every time an attribute is assigned, __setattr__() is called, this 6 # is recursion. ... last 1 frames repeated, from the frame below ... <ipython-input-50-5ff951d7c6d3> in __setattr__(self, name, value) 2 something = 0 3 def __setattr__(self, name, value): ----> 4 self.name = value 5 # since every time an attribute is assigned, __setattr__() is called, this 6 # is recursion. RecursionError: maximum recursion depth exceeded 1234567891011121314class isThereError(): something = 0 def __setattr__(self, name, value): print('좋은 시도였다 인간')presume = isThereError()presume.somethingnono = 1# 안에 재귀요소가 없으면 이렇게 평범하게 동작함. # attribute를 바꾸려고 (심지어 존재하지도 않는 것을 바꾸려고 시도) 했을 뿐인데 print가 찍히는 클래스가 있다?# -- Console Output --좋은 시도였다 인간 Magic Method가 어떤 개념이고, 어떤 식으로 동작하는지 감을 잡았으니,계속해서 문서의 예제들을 실행해 보자.…To be coutinued..

posts.title: Vuetify에서 반응형 웹페이지 제작 테크닉들
posts.text: <v-###> 태그들 해상도에 따라 disable 하기 “hidden-xs-only” : xs 사이즈에서만 해당 태그를 숨김 HTML 태그들 해상도에 따라 disable 하기 https://vuetifyjs.com/en/styles/display#visibility <br class="d-flex d-sm-none"> : sm 이하 사이즈에서만 줄바꿈이 등장하게 됨. 긴 텍스트를 해상도에 따라 끊어야 할 때 유용하다. 현재 화면의 해상도를 받아서 크기 조정하기 : 유튜브 동영상 예시 <script></script> 사이에 아래처럼 입력해보자. 123456789101112131415161718192021export default { data () { return { youtubeSize: { x: 0, y: 0, } } }, mounted () { this.onResize() }, methods: { onResize () { this.youtubeSize = { x: window.innerWidth - 20, y: window.innerWidth * 0.625 } // 20을 빼준 이유는 약간의 여유공간을 두어 화면에 스크롤이 생기지 않게 하기 위함이고, 0.625를 곱한 건 화면비를 16:10으로 유지하기 위함임 }, }, } 위와 같이 적용한 후, 태그는 아래와 같이 지정하자. 1<iframe :width=youtubeSize.x :height=youtubeSize.y ... 중략

posts.title: Python Built in function 정리 1 - Map
posts.slug: python built in function study - map
posts.text: map(function, iterable, …)Return an iterator that applies function to every item of iterable, yielding the results. If additional iterable arguments are passed, function must take that many arguments and is applied to the items from all iterables in parallel. With multiple iterables, the iterator stops when the shortest iterable is exhausted. For cases where the function inputs are already arranged into argument tuples, see itertools.starmap. Python Built-in Functionsmap 모든 iterable의 Item에 function을 적용하고, 결과를 생성하는 iterator를 Return합니다. (class 'map'이 return된다.) 123456map_test = [1,2,3,4,5,6]map_test2 = [7,8,9,10,11]map_result = map(lambda x,y : x*y, map_test, map_test2)print(type(map_result))# 출력값 <class 'map'> 추가적인 iterable arguments가 주어지면,function은 반드시 이 argument들을 받아야 합니다.그리고 function은 모든 iterable들의 item에 병렬적으로 적용됩니다.여러 개의 iterable이 있다면, iterator는 가장 짧은 iterable이 다 사용되면 멈춥니다. 12345678map_test = [1,2,3,4,5,6]map_test2 = [7,8,9,10,11]map_result = map(lambda x,y : x*y, map_test, map_test2)print(list(map_result))# 출력값 [7, 16, 27, 40, 55]# iterable 2개를 받았으며, 각각 map_test가 x에, map_test2가 y에 병렬적으로 대응되었다.# map_test2가 다 소진되자, 계산이 멈추고 결과가 return 된다. map_test의 6은 안 쓰이게 되었다. 함수의 입력값이 argument tuple로 이미 정렬되어 있다면, itertools.starmap()를 보세요.

posts.title: R - var(some_vector)는 표본분산을 계산한다
posts.text: 12> var(1:10)[1] 9.166667 “어라? 손으로 분산을 구해보니 8.25가 나오는데 왜 값이 다를까?”는 내가 지식이 부족해서 그랬던 것이었다. 모분산은 8.25겠지만, 표본분산은 9.166667이 맞다. https://blog.naver.com/physicopianist/221079231724 여기 아주 잘 정리되어 있다.

posts.title: XLSX file merging script
posts.excerpt: I was faced with a huge number of excel tables to merge.Of course, I did not want to merge them manually.Fortunately, all the tables were in the same form so it was easy to let the computer do the work for me.
posts.text: I was faced with a huge number of excel tables to merge.Of course, I did not want to merge them manually.Fortunately, all the tables were in the same form so it was easy to let the computer do the work for me. 1. FeaturesA. Essential functions a. Merge contents of all excel files to one xlsx file. b. If there is a empty file, skip it. 2. Codes[Codes in the File select button] reuse codes from the project below.Multiple file name changer by XLSM 1234567891011121314151617181920212223Sub File_Select() Dim Name_Location_Index As Long Dim FileName_Cache As String With Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogOpen) .AllowMultiSelect = True .Show ' Display paths of each file selected For Name_Location_Index = 1 To .SelectedItems.Count FileName_Cache = GetFilenameFromPath(.SelectedItems(Name_Location_Index)) Worksheets("Main").Cells(Name_Location_Index + 5, 1).Value = .SelectedItems(Name_Location_Index) Worksheets("Main").Cells(Name_Location_Index + 5, 2).Value = FileName_Cache Next Name_Location_Index End WithEnd SubFunction GetFilenameFromPath(ByVal strPath As String) As String If Right$(strPath, 1) <> "\" And Len(strPath) > 0 Then GetFilenameFromPath = GetFilenameFromPath(Left$(strPath, Len(strPath) - 1)) + Right$(strPath, 1) End IfEnd Function [Codes in the File merge button]12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485Sub File_Merge() Dim strTemplate As String Dim Wb_Bowl As Workbook Dim Sht_Bowl As Worksheet Dim Wb_From As Workbook Dim Sht_From As Worksheet Dim Each_File_Name As String Dim Column_End_Original As Long Dim loop_check As Long Dim Filename As String Application.ScreenUpdating = False ' Stop excel screen update for saving resources until all works are finished. Column_End_Original = Cells(Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row strTemplate = "F:\Working History\3.XXXX\1_데이터\1_원본 데이터들\재화획득소진_틀.xlsx" ' Empty form which just has column names. Set Wb_Bowl = Workbooks.Add(strTemplate) Set Sht_Bowl = Wb_Bowl.Worksheets("sheet") ' Set the file and sheet where merging will proceed. Filename = "F:\Working History\3.XXXX\1_데이터\1_원본 데이터들\RAW_MergeResult.xlsx" ' Set the file name of merging result. Wb_Bowl.SaveAs Filename:=Filename Application.DisplayAlerts = False ' Hide alert pop-up like "Do you really save it?" For loop_check = 6 To Column_End_Original ' List of target files begins at 6th column, so initial value of loop_check is 6. ThisWorkbook.Activate Each_File_Name = Cells(loop_check, 1).Text Set Wb_From = Workbooks.Open(Each_File_Name) ' Open target file Application.Wait (Now + TimeValue("0:00:04")) Set Sht_From = Wb_From.Worksheets("sheet") Sht_From.Activate Sht_From.Range(Cells(2, 1), Cells(LastRowInSheet(), LastColInSheet())).Copy ' Copy all contents in target file without column name. Sht_Bowl.Activate Correction = LastRowInSheet() + 1 ' Paste contents on the line after last line Sht_Bowl.Cells(Correction, 1).PasteSpecial _ Paste:=xlPasteAll Wb_From.Close ' Close target file Application.Wait (Now + TimeValue("0:00:01")) ActiveWorkbook.Save Application.Wait (Now + TimeValue("0:00:01")) Application.CutCopyMode = False ' Clear clipboard Next loop_check Application.DisplayAlerts = True Application.ScreenUpdating = True MsgBox "Merging process is complete. Check your result file."End SubFunction LastRowInSheet() As Long' Function that checks last row of sheet Dim LastRow As Long With ActiveSheet LastRow = .Cells(.Rows.Count, "A").End(xlUp).Row If LastRow = 1 Then LastRow = 2 End If End With LastRowInSheet = LastRowEnd FunctionFunction LastColInSheet() As Long' Function that checks last column of sheet Dim LastRow As Long With ActiveSheet LastCol = .Cells(1, .Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column End With LastColInSheet = LastColEnd Function 3. Example

posts.title: Multiple file name changer by XLSM
posts.slug: multiple file name changer by xlsm
posts.excerpt: There are programs for renaming multiple files like Darknamer,but they cannot handle complex rules.So I decided to use the might of Excel to do more complicated tasks.
posts.text: There are programs for renaming multiple files like Darknamer,but they cannot handle complex rules.So I decided to use the might of Excel to do more complicated tasks. 1. FeaturesA. Essential functions a. Select multiple files b. Change file names by the pairs of original name and new name. 2. Blueprint[File select button]     [Change name button] Original name(After selecting files, this column will be filled automatically) New name(without extension) 1.txt aaa 2.txt bbb 3.txt ccc 3. Codes[Codes in the File select button]1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526Sub File_Select() Dim Name_Location_Index As Long Dim FileName_Cache As String With Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogOpen) .AllowMultiSelect = True .Show ' Display paths of all file that are selected For Name_Location_Index = 1 To .SelectedItems.Count FileName_Cache = GetFilenameFromPath(.SelectedItems(Name_Location_Index)) Worksheets("Main").Cells(Name_Location_Index + 5, 1).Value = .SelectedItems(Name_Location_Index) ' Name list begins at fifth row, so 5 have to be added. ' In Column A, put the paths of selected file. In Column B, just put the file names with extension. Worksheets("Main").Cells(Name_Location_Index + 5, 2).Value = FileName_Cache Next Name_Location_Index End WithEnd SubFunction GetFilenameFromPath(ByVal strPath As String) As String ' This is the function which takes only file name from total file path. ' Using recursive call to cut the rightmost character in string until meet forward slash.('/') ' If total path is C:\example\exam.txt, exam.txt is the final return. If Right$(strPath, 1) <> "\" And Len(strPath) > 0 Then GetFilenameFromPath = GetFilenameFromPath(Left$(strPath, Len(strPath) - 1)) + Right$(strPath, 1) End IfEnd Function [Codes in the Change name button]1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526Sub File_Rename() Dim OldName, NewName As String Dim Column_End_Original As Long Dim Colunm_End_Goal As Long Dim loop_check As Long Column_End_Original = Cells(Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row Column_End_Goal = Cells(Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row ' Get the final rows of original name list and new name list For loop_check = 6 To Column_End_Original ' If Column_End_Original and Column_End_Goal are not same, it must return error. I need to make exceptional handling. OldName = Cells(loop_check, 1).Text NewName = Cells(loop_check, 3).Text + "." + GetExtention(OldName) Name OldName As NewName Next loop_check MsgBox "Mission complete"End SubFunction GetExtention(ByVal strPath As String) As String ' The function which is get extension from path. ' Mechanism of this function is exactly same with GetFilenameFromPath. If Right$(strPath, 1) <> "." And Len(strPath) > 0 Then GetExtention = GetExtention(Left$(strPath, Len(strPath) - 1)) + Right$(strPath, 1) End IfEnd Function 4. Result

posts.title: Web broswer control with Selenium
posts.excerpt: I had to extract 2 years worth of data from the Web.But this dumb tool I had could extract only 2 weeks of data at onceand one extracting sequence took 15 minutes!What should I do?
posts.text: I had to extract 2 years worth of data from the Web.But this dumb tool I had could extract only 2 weeks of data at onceand one extracting sequence took 15 minutes!What should I do? 1. FeaturesA. Essential functions a. It have to push the buttons in a predetermined order. b. It have to send date list to web tool. 2. Codes123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778from selenium import webdriverfrom selenium.webdriver.support.ui import Select# I import this for selection something in Select tagsfrom time import sleepfrom selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys# I import this for sending Tab key inputdateList = open('Date_Range_Selection.txt', 'rt')# Get dates from text format date listdateList_list = dateList.readlines()driver = webdriver.Chrome('chromedriver')# Use Chromedriver.get('http://Address of Web tool/login')sleep(5)driver.find_element_by_id('inputId').send_keys('[Account ID]')driver.find_element_by_id('inputPassword').send_keys('[Account Password]')sleep(5)driver.find_element_by_id('buttonLogin').click()sleep(5)driver.get('http://Address of Web tool/home')sleep(5)damnRadioButton = driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divStatGeneralBase"]/div/div[1]/div/div/label[1]')# From this section, structure of HTML codes become so complicated and IDs are not assigned on each objects properly.# So I use xpath to approach objects what I want.# I lost the way long time in this part, so the name of this value is 'damnRadioButton' XDdriver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", damnRadioButton)# Click radio button. I used Javascript to send click directly, since when I did QA, WebDriver Click was not working.# But after all things were finished, in the actual situation, Webdriver Click worked well. I left this code to keep Javascript example.sleep(5)selectAuctionRange = Select(driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divAuctionHouse"]/div[1]/div/div/select[2]'))# Select something from dropdown menuselectAuctionRange.select_by_value('3')# Select third thingsleep(3)for listElement in dateList_list: # Now use dates from the top of this code bufferData = listElement.split('-') # The structure of list of data is like this : # 2018-01-01 # 2018-01-02 # 2018-01-03 # Use hyphen as a delimiter for distinguishment between year, month and date. year = bufferData[0] month = bufferData[1] date = bufferData[2] # One cycle, one day of data. startDate = driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divAuctionHouse"]/div[1]/div/div/input[1]') startDate.send_keys(year) sleep(1) startDate.send_keys(Keys.TAB) sleep(1) startDate.send_keys(month) sleep(1) startDate.send_keys(date) endDate = driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divAuctionHouse"]/div[1]/div/div/input[2]') endDate.send_keys(year) sleep(1) endDate.send_keys(Keys.TAB) sleep(1) endDate.send_keys(month) sleep(1) endDate.send_keys(date) sleep(1) driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divAuctionHouse"]/div[1]/div/div/button').click() #Click extraction button sleep(25) driver.find_element_by_xpath('//*[@id="divAuctionHouse"]/div[5]/div/a').click() #Click "export to xlsx" button print(year+month+date+"extraction complete!") del bufferData[:] #Initialize bufferprint("~The end~")

posts.title: Telegram bot for alarming ERC-20 token balance
posts.slug: telegram bot for alarming erc-20 token balance
posts.path: 2018/01/10/telegram bot for alarming erc-20 token balance/
posts.permalink: https://limyj0708.github.io/2018/01/10/telegram bot for alarming erc-20 token balance/
posts.excerpt: Do you run cryptocurrency nodes?Do you want to feel happy seeing your balance increasing?Do you want to know the best timing to withdraw the surplus balance?I wanted to do so, so I wrote this script.
posts.text: Do you run cryptocurrency nodes?Do you want to feel happy seeing your balance increasing?Do you want to know the best timing to withdraw the surplus balance?I wanted to do so, so I wrote this script. 1. Features?A. Essential functions a. Get crypto wallet addresses from the list and read the balance of particular cryptocurrency. b. Send balance list to my telegram bot c. Run this function at every 9:00 am, Thursday.(make this part in my CentOS homeserver with Crontab) 2. Codes12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849import jsonimport urllib.requestimport telegram # Use telegram bot library : https://github.com/python-telegram-bot/python-telegram-botbot = telegram.Bot(token='Put my bot token') # put the token to access my botwalletList_Lim = open('walletList_Lim.txt', 'rt') # open wallet list filewalletList_Park = open('walletList_Park.txt', 'rt') # wallet list of my friendwalletList_Raw_Lim = walletList_Lim.readlines() # read texts in the wallet list line by line, then put it to the list named walletList_Raw_LimwalletList_Raw_Park = walletList_Park.readlines()class NoticeFunctions: def __init__(self, wallet_list, chat_id): self.wallet_list = wallet_list self.chat_id = chat_id def get_balance_to_list(self): balance_list_inner = [] #list for save balances for eachWallet in self.wallet_list: balanceCheckUrl = "http://api.etherscan.io/api?module=account&action=tokenbalance&contractaddress=0x08f5a9235b08173b7569f83645d2c7fb55e8ccd8&address=" \ + eachWallet.rstrip('\n') + "&tag=latest&apikey=A2DQFNBPMK22PF9PX8Y9JWIXJ2515GGMGP" wallet_data_raw = urllib.request.urlopen(balanceCheckUrl).read() # read wallet information from etherscan # after contractaddress you have to put contractaddress of token what you want to check. This contractaddress is Tierion. # I use rstrip to erase trailing newline character. Because wallet list looks like this : # Address1 # Address2 # Address3 wallet_data_dict = json.loads(wallet_data_raw) # Return value is dictionary type balance_list_inner.append(wallet_data_dict['result']) #Balance is the value which associates with 'result' key. Put it to the list # print("Fill that list") for components in balance_list_inner: components_digit_correction = float(components) * 0.00000001 #Correction smallest unit to the units place bot.sendMessage(chat_id=self.chat_id, text=components_digit_correction) # Send messeage # print("Send") del balance_list_inner[:] # print("List initialized") N_Lim = NoticeFunctions(walletList_Raw_Lim, "Put the chat_id of telegram bot")N_Park = NoticeFunctions(walletList_Raw_Park, "Put the chat_id of telegram bot ")# print("Create instance")N_Lim.get_balance_to_list()N_Park.get_balance_to_list()
